---
title: "Архитектура аудио-плеера"
format: html
---

# Архитектура аудио-плеера

State diagrams и component diagrams для Audio Player Service.

## 1. Жизненный цикл плеера (Player Lifecycle)

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-01
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 1"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> ServiceCreated
    
    ServiceCreated --> Initializing: onCreate()
    Initializing --> Idle: Initialization complete
    
    Idle --> LoadingPlaylist: setPlaylist()
    LoadingPlaylist --> Ready: Playlist loaded
    LoadingPlaylist --> Error: Load failed
    
    Ready --> Playing: play()
    Ready --> Idle: clear()
    
    Playing --> Paused: pause()
    Playing --> Buffering: Buffer underrun
    Playing --> TrackEnded: Track finished
    Playing --> Error: Playback error
    
    Paused --> Playing: play()
    Paused --> Ready: stop()
    
    Buffering --> Playing: Buffer filled
    Buffering --> Error: Buffer failed
    
    TrackEnded --> Playing: Auto-next track
    TrackEnded --> Ready: Last track
    
    Error --> Idle: reset()
    
    state Playing {
        [*] --> NormalPlayback
        NormalPlayback --> Seeking: seekTo()
        Seeking --> NormalPlayback: Seek complete
        
        NormalPlayback --> SpeedChanging: setSpeed()
        SpeedChanging --> NormalPlayback: Speed applied
    }
    
    Ready --> Destroying: onDestroy()
    Idle --> Destroying: onDestroy()
    Paused --> Destroying: onDestroy()
    Destroying --> [*]
```

## 2. Компоненты AudioPlayerService

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-02
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 2"
graph TB
    subgraph "AudioPlayerService"
        Service[MediaLibraryService<br/>Main Service]
        
        subgraph "Playback Management"
            PlaylistMgr[PlaylistManager<br/>Create & manage playlists]
            PlaybackCtrl[PlaybackController<br/>Play/Pause/Seek/Skip]
            PositionMgr[PositionManager<br/>Track & save position]
        end
        
        subgraph "Media Session"
            SessionMgr[MediaSessionManager<br/>MediaSession lifecycle]
            Callback[SessionCallback<br/>Handle media buttons]
            Actions[ActionReceiver<br/>Custom actions]
        end
        
        subgraph "Notifications"
            NotifMgr[NotificationManager<br/>Update notifications]
            NotifProvider[NotificationProvider<br/>Media3 integration]
        end
        
        subgraph "Timers"
            SleepTimer[SleepTimerManager<br/>Auto-stop timer]
            PlaybackTimer[PlaybackTimer<br/>Statistics]
            InactivityTimer[InactivityTimer<br/>Auto cleanup]
        end
        
        subgraph "Metadata & State"
            MetadataMgr[MetadataManager<br/>Track metadata]
            StateHelper[PlayerStateHelper<br/>State queries]
            Persistence[PersistenceManager<br/>Save/restore state]
        end
        
        subgraph "Media Engine"
            ExoPlayer[ExoPlayer<br/>Media3]
            Listener[PlayerListener<br/>Event handling]
            Config[PlayerConfigurator<br/>Audio settings]
        end
    end
    
    Service --> PlaylistMgr
    Service --> PlaybackCtrl
    Service --> PositionMgr
    Service --> SessionMgr
    Service --> NotifMgr
    Service --> SleepTimer
    Service --> MetadataMgr
    Service --> Persistence
    
    PlaybackCtrl --> ExoPlayer
    PlaybackCtrl --> Config
    SessionMgr --> Callback
    SessionMgr --> Actions
    NotifMgr --> NotifProvider
    ExoPlayer --> Listener
    
    Listener -.Events.-> PositionMgr
    Listener -.Events.-> MetadataMgr
    Listener -.Events.-> NotifMgr
    
    style Service fill:#e1f5ff
    style ExoPlayer fill:#fff3e0
```

## 3. Состояния Sleep Timer

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-03
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 3"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Inactive
    
    Inactive --> ConfiguringFixed: User sets fixed duration
    Inactive --> ConfiguringTrack: User sets end of track
    
    ConfiguringFixed --> Active: Timer started
    ConfiguringTrack --> Active: Timer started
    
    state Active {
        [*] --> Running
        Running --> Paused: Player paused
        Paused --> Running: Player resumed
        Running --> [*]: Timer expired
    }
    
    Active --> Cancelled: User cancelled
    Active --> Inactive: Timer completed
    Cancelled --> Inactive
    
    state Active {
        state Running {
            [*] --> Counting
            Counting --> Counting: Tick (1s)
        }
    }
```

## 4. Position Saving Strategy

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-04
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 4"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NotTracking
    
    NotTracking --> Tracking: Playback started
    Tracking --> NotTracking: Playback stopped
    
    state Tracking {
        [*] --> Waiting
        Waiting --> Saving: 5 seconds elapsed
        Saving --> Waiting: Save complete
        
        state Saving {
            [*] --> FetchingPosition
            FetchingPosition --> WritingDB: Position fetched
            WritingDB --> [*]: Written
        }
    }
    
    Tracking --> ForceSave: Track changed
    ForceSave --> Tracking: Saved
    
    Tracking --> ForceSave: User seeks
    ForceSave --> Tracking: Saved
```

## 5. Notification Updates

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-05
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 5"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NoNotification
    
    NoNotification --> ShowingNotification: Service started
    
    state ShowingNotification {
        [*] --> BasicInfo
        
        BasicInfo --> UpdatingMetadata: Metadata changed
        UpdatingMetadata --> BasicInfo: Updated
        
        BasicInfo --> UpdatingState: Play/Pause
        UpdatingState --> BasicInfo: Updated
        
        BasicInfo --> UpdatingProgress: Position changed
        UpdatingProgress --> BasicInfo: Updated
    }
    
    ShowingNotification --> NoNotification: Service stopped
```

## 6. Chapter Navigation

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-06
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 6"
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> NoChapters
    
    NoChapters --> LoadingChapters: Book has chapters
    LoadingChapters --> ChaptersReady: Chapters loaded
    LoadingChapters --> NoChapters: Load failed
    
    state ChaptersReady {
        [*] --> CurrentChapter
        CurrentChapter --> Seeking: User selects chapter
        Seeking --> CurrentChapter: Seek complete
        
        CurrentChapter --> AutoNext: Current track ended
        AutoNext --> CurrentChapter: Next chapter
    }
    
    ChaptersReady --> NoChapters: Book changed
```

## 7. Audio Processing Pipeline

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-07
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 7"
graph LR
    Source[Audio Source<br/>File/Stream] --> Decoder[Media Codec<br/>Decoder]
    
    Decoder --> Speed[Speed Processor<br/>0.5x - 3.0x]
    Speed --> Pitch[Pitch Processor<br/>Optional]
    Pitch --> EQ[Equalizer<br/>Optional]
    EQ --> Volume[Volume Boost<br/>Optional]
    
    Volume --> Mixer[Audio Mixer]
    Mixer --> Output[Audio Output<br/>Speaker/Headphones]
    
    Config[PlayerConfigurator] -.configures.-> Speed
    Config -.configures.-> Pitch
    Config -.configures.-> EQ
    Config -.configures.-> Volume
    
    style Source fill:#e3f2fd
    style Output fill:#c8e6c9
    style Config fill:#fff3e0
```

## 8. Media Session Actions

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-08
%%| fig-cap: "Diagram 8"
graph TB
    User[User Input] --> Actions{Action Type}
    
    Actions -->|System Button| MediaButton[Media Button]
    Actions -->|Notification| NotifAction[Notification Action]
    Actions -->|Android Auto| AutoAction[Auto Action]
    Actions -->|Quick Settings| QSAction[QS Action]
    
    MediaButton --> SessionCallback[SessionCallback]
    NotifAction --> SessionCallback
    AutoAction --> SessionCallback
    QSAction --> SessionCallback
    
    SessionCallback --> Handler{Command}
    
    Handler -->|PLAY| Play[PlaybackController.play]
    Handler -->|PAUSE| Pause[PlaybackController.pause]
    Handler -->|SKIP_NEXT| Next[PlaybackController.next]
    Handler -->|SKIP_PREV| Prev[PlaybackController.previous]
    Handler -->|SEEK| Seek[PlaybackController.seekTo]
    Handler -->|CUSTOM| Custom[Custom Action Handler]
    
    Play --> ExoPlayer[ExoPlayer]
    Pause --> ExoPlayer
    Next --> ExoPlayer
    Prev --> ExoPlayer
    Seek --> ExoPlayer
    
    Custom -->|SET_SPEED| Speed[Set Playback Speed]
    Custom -->|START_TIMER| Timer[Start Sleep Timer]
    Custom -->|JUMP_FORWARD| JumpF[Jump +30s]
    Custom -->|JUMP_BACKWARD| JumpB[Jump -10s]
    
    style User fill:#e3f2fd
    style ExoPlayer fill:#fff3e0
```

## Описание компонентов

### Core Components

1. **PlaylistManager**
   - Создаёт MediaItems для ExoPlayer
   - Управляет порядком треков
   - Поддерживает начальную позицию (resume)

2. **PlaybackController**
   - Основной интерфейс управления воспроизведением
   - Методы: play(), pause(), seekTo(), skipNext(), skipPrevious()
   - Управляет speed и pitch

3. **PositionManager**
   - Автосохранение каждые 5 секунд
   - Немедленное сохранение при seek и track change
   - Восстановление позиции при запуске

### Session Components

4. **MediaSessionManager**
   - Управляет MediaLibrarySession
   - Интеграция с system media controls
   - Поддержка Android Auto

5. **SessionCallback**
   - Обрабатывает команды от media buttons
   - Custom actions (sleep timer, speed, jumps)

### Notification Components

6. **NotificationManager**
   - Обновляет notification при изменениях
   - Media-style notification (Android 13+)
   - Action buttons (Play/Pause/Skip)

### Timer Components

7. **SleepTimerManager**
   - Fixed duration mode
   - End of track mode
   - Suspendable (pause при паузе плеера)

8. **InactivityTimer**
   - 30 минут бездействия
   - Автоматическая остановка сервиса

### State Components

9. **PlayerPersistenceManager**
   - Сохраняет полное состояние плеера
   - Восстанавливает при перезапуске
   - Включает: playlist, position, speed, repeat mode

10. **MetadataManager**
    - Загружает metadata для треков
    - Кэширует в Room Database
    - Обновляет UI через MediaSession
